hero.title: From recording to transcript, entirely offline.
hero.subtitle: Lumiso Transcribe turns audio and video into accurate transcripts — powered by Whisper, running entirely on your Mac. No uploads, ever.
hero.socialProof: No subscriptions. No accounts. No telemetry.

why.title: Four promises, every app.
why.subtitle: We only ship software we'd want on our own machines. That translates into four things you can rely on.

fast.title: Fast
fast.description: Native code, hardware acceleration, instant launch. Your time is the one thing we never spend.

native.title: Native
native.description: Real platform apps that respect your OS — its shortcuts, its conventions, its look. No web wrappers.

private.title: Private
private.description: Your data stays on your machine. No accounts, no telemetry, no quiet uploads. Privacy is the default, not a tier.

affordable.title: Affordable
affordable.description: Pay once, own it forever. Free versions that are actually useful, and Pro upgrades priced like a nice dinner.

featured.title: Featured apps
featured.subtitle: Every app solves one real problem, beautifully. The catalog grows slowly — on purpose.

testimonials.title: Loved by people who notice details.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: The short version of everything people ask before their first purchase.

platforms.question: Which platforms do you support?
platforms.answer: Each app lists its platform on its page. Lumiso Transcribe is a native macOS app (macOS 14+). Windows versions of future apps will be announced on the blog.

payment.question: How does purchasing work?
payment.answer: Checkout is handled by Paddle, our merchant of record — they process the payment, handle VAT, and send your invoice. Your license key arrives by email within minutes.

license.question: What kind of license do I get?
license.answer: A perpetual, per-person license verified offline. Use it on every machine you personally use. Major versions (1.x) include free updates.

refund.question: What's your refund policy?
refund.answer: 14 days, no questions asked. Try the free version first — it's the same app, so you'll know exactly what you're buying.

cta.title: Try Lumiso Transcribe today.
cta.subtitle: The free version is fully usable — download it, drop in a recording, and see for yourself.

footer.tagline: Beautiful, fast, private desktop software. Built by an independent developer, priced fairly.

newsletter.title: Stay in the loop
newsletter.subtitle: New apps and major updates. A few emails a year, no noise.
newsletter.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

appsPage.metaDescription: Fast, private, native desktop applications. Pay once, own forever.
appsPage.title: Apps that respect you.
appsPage.subtitle: A small catalog, built slowly and cared for daily. Each app is native, private, and yours forever.

appPage.screenshotsSubtitle: The real interface — click any screen to zoom in.
appPage.featuresTitle: Everything you need, nothing you don't
appPage.pricingSubtitle: Start free. Upgrade once. Own it forever.
appPage.paddleDisclosure: Payments are securely processed by Paddle.com, our authorized reseller and merchant of record.
appPage.downloadSubtitle: Free download, no account required. Upgrade to Pro whenever you're ready.
appPage.checkoutUnavailable: Checkout is being configured — check back shortly.

blog.metaDescription: Updates, development notes, and tips from AppsThere.
blog.title: Notes from the workbench
blog.subtitle: Release announcements, engineering notes, and practical tips.

account.title: Your purchases
account.subtitle: Licenses are delivered by email and verified offline — there's no account to maintain and no password to lose.
account.lookupSubtitle: Enter your purchase email and we'll resend every license key associated with it.
account.lookupSuccess: If that address has purchases, the license keys are on their way.
account.lookupError: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.
account.billingBody: Payments are processed by Paddle, our merchant of record. Your receipt email contains a link to view invoices, update billing details, or request a refund.
account.updatesBody: Apps check for updates themselves and every release is listed on each app's changelog. Your license covers all 1.x updates.
account.supportBody: Write to {email} — you'll get an answer from the person who built the app.

checkout.successSubtitle: Your payment went through. Your license key is on its way to your inbox and usually arrives within a couple of minutes.
checkout.step1: Open the email from AppsThere and copy your license key.
checkout.step2: In the app, open Settings → License.
checkout.step3: Paste the key — activation is instant and works offline.
checkout.noEmail: Nothing after 10 minutes? Check spam, then write to {email}.

notFound.title: This page doesn't exist.
notFound.body: The link may be outdated, or the page may have moved.

meta.homeTitle: AppsThere — Software you'll actually enjoy using
meta.homeDescription: Fast, elegant, private desktop applications. Pay once, own forever. Home of Lumiso Transcribe.
